title: Franquevillia minima
taxonomy: Franquevillia minima is a species of flowering plant, and its classification would place it within the family Fabaceae. This family is commonly known as the legume family, consisting of approximately 19,000 known species. As a member of this family, Franquevillia minima would also be classified as a legume. Legumes are characterized by their fruit, which are typically pods containing seeds. Further classification would involve identifying the genus and specific characteristics of the plant.
